name: iscrapedduck
description: Personal iPhone-focused iScrapedDuck fork for Pokemon GO raid hundo CP data

scripts.check:raids: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const data=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('files/raids.json','utf8')); if(!Array.isArray(data.raids)||!data.raids.length) throw new Error('raids missing/empty'); for (const r of data.raids) { if(!r.name) throw new Error('raid missing name'); if(r.combatPower?.normal?.max == null && r.combatPower?.boosted?.max == null) throw new Error('raid missing CP: '+r.name); } console.log('OK raids:', data.raids.length)"

author: bigfoott
